landing.hero.eyebrow: Where Big Buyers meet the Makers · GST Verified
landing.hero.subline: All in one place. No WhatsApp chaos. No fake suppliers.
landing.hero.buy_title: I need to buy or procure
landing.hero.buy_desc: Find GST-verified vendors in Gujarat — fast
landing.hero.sell_desc: Get discovered by verified buyers near you
landing.problem.heading:
Finding the right vendor in Gujarat
shouldn't feel like a full-time job.
landing.problem.desc: Most business owners in Gujarat still find vendors through WhatsApp groups, phone calls, and personal references. It works — until it doesn't. One bad vendor, one unverified GSTIN, one scattered quote process — and you've lost time, money, and trust.
landing.problem.gst.title: You have no idea if a vendor is GST-registered
landing.problem.gst.desc: Before Vahivat, you had to call the vendor, ask for their GSTIN, then manually check it on the government portal. Most people skip this step — and pay for it later.
landing.problem.chats.title: Vendor hunting means 10 WhatsApp chats going nowhere
landing.problem.chats.desc: You post in 3 groups, get 15 replies, half of them aren't even relevant. Then you follow up for days. Then someone ghosts you. Sound familiar?
landing.problem.quotes.title: Your quotes are scattered across phones and emails
landing.problem.quotes.desc: You got one quote on WhatsApp, one over email, one in a PDF someone sent last Tuesday. Comparing them means opening five things at once. There has to be a better way.
landing.problem.record.title: When something goes wrong, there's no record
landing.problem.record.desc: Verbal agreements. Screenshots. 'He said, she said.' No deal history. No accountability. No paper trail. B2B business in India deserves better than this.
landing.how.heading:
Simple enough for your first day.
Powerful enough to run your business.
landing.buyer_steps.rfq.title: Tell us what you need — in plain language
landing.buyer_steps.rfq.desc: Type in Gujarati, Hindi, or English. No forms to decode. No jargon. Just tell us what product or service you're looking for, how many you need, and when you need it. Our AI turns it into a proper RFQ automatically.
landing.buyer_steps.quotes.title: Receive quotes from GST-verified suppliers only
landing.buyer_steps.quotes.desc: Every vendor on Vahivat has been verified against their GSTIN before they could list. You'll never get a quote from an unregistered or fake supplier. All quotes come to one place — no more hunting across WhatsApp and email.
landing.buyer_steps.compare.title: Compare, chat, and close — all in one place
landing.buyer_steps.compare.desc: See all your quotes side by side. Check each vendor's rating, response time, and deal history. Chat with them directly about the deal. No middleman. No confusion. Just a clean, fast close.
landing.vendor_steps.gstin.title: Enter your GSTIN — we verify it in seconds
landing.vendor_steps.gstin.desc: No paperwork. No waiting for approval emails. Enter your 15-digit GSTIN and our system checks it against the government database instantly. If you're registered and active, you're verified. Done.
landing.vendor_steps.list.title: List your products or services in 5 minutes
landing.vendor_steps.list.desc: Add what you sell, at what price, with photos if you have them. It goes live on Vahivat immediately. Buyers searching for what you offer — in Ahmedabad, Surat, or anywhere in Gujarat — will start finding you.
landing.vendor_steps.close.title: Buyers come to you. You just respond and close.
landing.vendor_steps.close.desc: Verified buyers send you RFQs directly. You get a notification, review the requirement, send your quote, and negotiate on the platform. No cold calling. No chasing. Just real business inquiries from real buyers.
landing.features.heading:
We built this for the way
Gujarat actually does business.
landing.features.gst.title: Automatic GST Verification
landing.features.gst.desc: Every single vendor is verified against their GSTIN before their listing goes live. We check directly against the government database — not just what they claim. Your input tax credit stays safe. Your risk stays low.
landing.features.ai.title: AI That Understands Gujarati
landing.features.ai.desc: Type your requirement in Gujarati or Hindi. Our AI reads it, structures it into a proper RFQ with quantity, budget, and delivery timeline — and sends it to matched vendors automatically. No forms. No engineering degree required.
landing.features.chat.title: Chat That's Tied to Your Deal
landing.features.chat.desc: Every conversation on Vahivat is linked to the specific order it's about. Find any quote, document, or discussion in seconds. When you come back to a deal after two weeks, everything is exactly where you left it.
landing.features.compare.title: Side-by-Side Quote Comparison
landing.features.compare.desc: Request quotes from 5 vendors at once. See them lined up — price, delivery time, vendor rating, deal history — in one screen. Make the right call without opening a single spreadsheet.
landing.features.invoice.title: GST Invoice Generator
landing.features.invoice.desc: Once a deal is done, generate a GST-compliant invoice with one tap. Both your GSTIN and the vendor's GSTIN are already filled in. Download it as a PDF. Your accounts team will thank you.
landing.features.progress.title: Real-Time Deal Progress
landing.features.progress.desc: Every deal has a visual timeline — from the first inquiry all the way to payment confirmed. Both you and your vendor see the exact same status in real time. No more 'kya hua bhai?' calls.
landing.ai.heading: AI That Understands Gujarati
landing.ai.subheading: AI that actually understands how Gujarat does business
landing.ai.desc:
Most procurement software is designed for a CTO in Bangalore or a CFO in Mumbai. Vahivat's AI is designed for a business owner in Rajkot who thinks in Gujarati.

Tell it what you need — in your own words. It handles the structure, the matching, the vendor shortlist. You just pick the best quote and close the deal.
landing.ai.demo_text: I need 50 laptops, delivery next month, budget 30,000 per unit
landing.ai.demo_text_typed: mane 50 laptops joiye, next month delivery, budget 30,000 per unit
landing.ai.result_title: ✓ RFQ created — sent to 12 verified IT vendors in Ahmedabad
landing.pricing.heading:
No hidden fees.
No surprises.
landing.pricing.callout: Buyers always use Vahivat completely free. Pricing below is for vendors only.
landing.pricing.plans.free.name: Free
landing.pricing.plans.free.feat1: List up to 3 products or services
landing.pricing.plans.basic.name: Basic
landing.pricing.plans.basic.feat2: GST Verified badge on your profile
landing.pricing.plans.pro.name: Pro
landing.pricing.bottom_note:
14-day free trial on Basic and Pro. No credit card required to start.
Pay via UPI or bank transfer — no international card needed.
landing.testimonials.heading: Businesses in Gujarat trust Vahivat.
landing.testimonials.subheading: Real businesses. Real results. No made-up quotes.
landing.testimonials.jp.name: Jayesh Patel
landing.testimonials.jp.quote: Finding vendors on Vahivat is very easy. Previously I had to visit separate sites to verify GST — I was tired of that problem. Since coming here it feels completely peaceful.
landing.testimonials.ms.name: Mita Shah
landing.testimonials.ms.quote: Before, I had to post in 10 WhatsApp groups and wait. Now I post one RFQ on Vahivat and by the next day all verified vendors have responded. Saved time and stress both.
landing.testimonials.rd.name: Rakesh Desai
landing.testimonials.rd.quote: The AI RFQ generator and quote comparison feature is very useful. My monthly procurement still takes the same time, but I'm doing it stress-free.
landing.faq.heading: Questions Gujarat business owners ask us
landing.faq.q0: Is Vahivat only for IT vendors in Gujarat?
landing.faq.a0: Right now, yes — we've launched with IT because that's where we could build the deepest, most verified marketplace first. Textile, Pharma, Construction, FMCG, and Manufacturing are all coming. You can join the waitlist for your industry below.
landing.faq.q1: How do I know a vendor's GST registration is actually verified?
landing.faq.a1: Every vendor on Vahivat goes through automatic GSTIN verification before their listing goes live. We check directly against the government GST database — not just what the vendor tells us. If their GSTIN is inactive, cancelled, or doesn't match their business name, they don't get listed. Simple.
landing.faq.q2: What's the difference between Vahivat and IndiaMART?
landing.faq.a2: IndiaMART is a large national directory — good for reach, but vendors aren't automatically verified, leads are shared with competitors, and there's no real-time deal tracking or chat tied to your orders. Vahivat is built specifically for Gujarat, every vendor is GST-verified, and the entire procurement journey — from RFQ to invoice — happens in one place.
landing.faq.q3: Can I use Vahivat in Gujarati?
landing.faq.a3: Yes — that's actually one of the main reasons we built Vahivat. You can search for vendors, post RFQs, and even use our AI procurement tool in Gujarati. Switch languages in the top bar anytime.
landing.faq.a4: Completely. Buyers browse verified vendors, send RFQs, compare quotes, and manage deals — all for free, forever. We charge vendors for advanced listing features, not buyers.
landing.faq.q5: How long does vendor verification take?
landing.faq.a5: For most vendors, GST verification is automatic and takes under 30 seconds. If there's a mismatch or the API can't reach the government server, it goes to manual review — which takes 24-48 hours. Either way, you know the status immediately.
landing.faq.q6: Can I generate GST invoices on Vahivat?
landing.faq.a6: Yes — vendors on the Pro plan can generate GST-compliant invoices directly after a deal closes. Your GSTIN, the buyer's GSTIN, the amount, and HSN codes are pre-filled. Download as PDF and send it over.
landing.faq.q7: What cities in Gujarat does Vahivat cover?
landing.faq.a7: We're active in Ahmedabad, Surat, Rajkot, and Vadodara right now. Any verified business in Gujarat can sign up — if your buyers or vendors are in Gujarat, Vahivat connects you.
landing.industries.heading:
Built for IT today.
Coming for every industry in Gujarat.
landing.industries.desc: We started with IT because that's where we knew the problems best. Every industry on this list will get the same depth — verified vendors, AI-powered procurement, and deal tracking built specifically for how that sector works.

landing.cta.heading: Are you ready?
landing.cta.subheading: Join 200+ businesses across Gujarat that already find, verify, and work with vendors on Vahivat.
